programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: The buyers gamble on a new facility in La Habra, while Dusty tries his luck on a new unit and Kenny picks out a new locker.

programs.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programs.desc: Discover the nuances of dance and fight in the skilled moves of a Silambam artist from Chennai and later, meet the only authorised taxidermist from Mumbai, Dr. Santosh Gaikwad.

programs.title: Forged in Fire
programs.desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programs.title: Shipping Wars
programs.desc: Shipping an iconic piece from a popular ghost movie has Roy at his wit's end. Meanwhile the Two Blondes take on a load of dinosaurs.
